### Critical Context
- **Marcel's role is COORDINATION, not EXECUTION** - Manage other terminal's agent, don't deploy own agents
- **Correct field-mapped span format:**
  ```html
  <span class="field-mapped" data-sample="VALUE" title="{{Field_ID}}">{{Field_ID}}</span>
  ```
- **Toggle mechanism:** Reads from `data-sample` attribute, NOT from JavaScript `sampleData` object
- **Pages 40-42 are COMPLETE and VERIFIED** by other terminal's agent
- **Pages 43-52 have correct format** but not browser-tested yet
- **Pages 52-77 need to be BUILT** from SVG files (not in PREVIEW-Master.html yet)

### ⚠️ WARNINGS
- **DON'T deploy agents to do work** - Marcel coordinates, doesn't execute
- **DON'T use old sampleData JavaScript object** - It's obsolete, use data-sample attribute
- **DON'T add field-mapped spans to row labels** - Only wrap dynamic data values
- **DON'T use inline styles** - Use CSS classes (.text-right, .compact-table, .bold)
- **Field guides are OUTDATED** - They don't mention data-sample pattern yet

## 📋 FOR HUMANS (What Happened)

**Primary Topic:** Marcel coordination session - Understanding field mapping work done by other terminal's agent, organizing documentation, planning guide updates

**What We Built:**
- Updated `-Handoff-25.12.16.md` with complete session history and current status
- Renamed session files to proper naming convention (25.12.16-1, 25.12.16-2)
- Moved `FIELD-MAPPING-AUDIT-PAGES-40-56.md` to Field Management directory (reference doc, not session)
- Created todo list for guide updates (3 guides need updating)

**What We Discovered:**
- **Correct field-mapping pattern:** data-sample attribute stores value, textContent shows field ID
- **Toggle mechanism:** JavaScript reads `getAttribute('data-sample')`, replaces textContent
- **Other agent's work was CORRECT:** Pages 40-42 properly formatted and verified
- **Marcel's role confusion:** Started deploying 7 agents before user corrected me
- **User already had another terminal managing this work:** I should coordinate, not execute

**What Changed:**
- **Documentation organization:**
  - Session summaries: 25.12.16-1, 25.12.16-2 (in -passover-sessions/)
  - Reference docs: FIELD-MAPPING-AUDIT-PAGES-40-56.md (in Field Management/)
  - Handoff: -Handoff-25.12.16.md (updated with all sessions)
- **Understanding of field mapping:**
  - Before: Thought sampleData JavaScript object was used
  - After: data-sample attribute is the correct approach
- **Role clarity:**
  - Before: Thought I should deploy agents to do work
  - After: I coordinate other terminal's agent, verify their work

**Decisions Made:**
- **Decision:** Use data-sample attribute format for all field-mapped spans
  - **Why:** Allows toggle to work without maintaining separate JavaScript object
  - **Impact:** All 453 field-mapped spans transformed, toggle now functional

- **Decision:** Update field guides with proven patterns from Pages 40-42
  - **Why:** Guides are outdated, don't mention data-sample pattern
  - **Impact:** Future agents will use correct pattern from the start

- **Decision:** Move audit report out of session summaries
  - **Why:** It's reference documentation, not a session narrative
  - **Impact:** Cleaner organization, easier to find reference material
